scores.correctness_notes: Fully correct — covers all gold standard points (persistence, (user_id, type, key) identity, all three types with correct key formats, pebble_custom_notice event, event object attributes) plus valid additional detail on get_notice/get_notices, Notice attributes, and testing patterns.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all APIs mentioned (container.get_notice, container.get_notices, ops.pebble.NoticeType.CUSTOM, ops.PebbleCustomNoticeEvent, event.notice, event.workload) are real ops APIs, not fabricated.
